ddls:
CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the town is located */,
  "town_population" INTEGER /* Population of the town */,
  "town_area" REAL /* Area of the town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_towns_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure record */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* ID of the town the infrastructure data belongs to */,
  "infrastructure_type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure (e.g., bridges, sidewalks, bike lanes) */,
  "bridges" REAL /* Number of bridges in the town */,
  "sidewalks" REAL /* Length of sidewalks in the town (in miles) */,
  "bike_lanes" REAL /* Length of bike lanes in the town (in miles) */,
  "condition_rating" TEXT /* Condition rating of the infrastructure (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Maintenance cost of the infrastructure */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the infrastructure data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity_metrics" (
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equity record */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* ID of the town the equity data belongs to */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the town */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the town */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the town */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the town */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the town's residents */,
  "healthcare_access" TEXT /* Access to healthcare facilities in the town */,
  "transportation_options" TEXT /* Availability of different transportation options in the town */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the equity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equity_metrics_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, town official) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure_improvement" (
  "improvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement record */,
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the infrastructure the improvement belongs to */,
  "improvement_date" TEXT /* Date of the improvement */,
  "improvement_cost" REAL /* Cost of the improvement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("improvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_improvement_infrastructure_id FOREIGN KEY ("infrastructure_id") REFERENCES infrastructure ("infrastructure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity_metric_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equity metric the history belongs to */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equity_metric_history_equity_id FOREIGN KEY ("equity_id") REFERENCES equity_metrics ("equity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, query) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
